summary: Fixed two factual errors in PLAYBOOK.md: corrected the slug description to accurately state dots are retained (not stripped), and corrected the branch description to state -B is used only on initial creation and re-runs reuse the existing worktree. Added five new tests to test/worktree.test.mjs that verify PLAYBOOK.md contains the Git Worktrees section and key accurate claims. All 565 tests pass.
